sub_modules.nr_poly_eval_fixed: Combinational Horner-form fixed-point evaluation of the cubic polynomial.
sub_modules.nr_derivative_eval_fixed: Combinational fixed-point evaluation of the polynomial derivative.
sub_modules.nr_fixed_divider: Combinational fixed-point division block for the Newton correction term.
sub_modules.nr_convergence_check: Combinational tolerance check for polynomial residual or update magnitude.
sub_modules.nr_root_verify: Combinational verification block checking whether the final residual is within tolerance.
